title: gomphogyne heterosperma
intro: Gomphogyne heterosperma, also known as the " Chinese gomphogyne" or " Five-angled gomphogyne", is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Gomphogyne heterosperma include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
